targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents), 0) / 100.0 AS value FROM income WHERE date >= date('now', '-30 days')
SELECT COALESCE(-SUM(amount_cents), 0) / 100.0 AS value FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-30 days')

panels.title: Savings rate (30d)
panels.description: (Income − Spend) ÷ Income × 100. >0 means saving; <0 means spending more than earning.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH i AS (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(amount_cents), 0) AS v FROM income WHERE date >= date('now', '-30 days')), s AS (SELECT COALESCE(-SUM(amount_cents), 0) AS v FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-30 days')) SELECT CASE WHEN i.v = 0 THEN NULL ELSE ROUND(100.0 * (i.v - s.v) / i.v, 1) END AS value FROM i, s

panels.title: Monthly income vs spend (last 18 months)
panels.description: Income (positive, green) above zero; spend (negative, red) below. Bigger gap above the X axis = better month.

targets.rawQueryText: WITH months AS (SELECT DISTINCT month FROM transactions WHERE date >= date('now', '-18 months') ORDER BY month) SELECT m.month AS Month, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount_cents) FROM income WHERE month = m.month), 0) / 100.0 AS Income, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(amount_cents) FROM spending WHERE month = m.month), 0) / 100.0 AS Spend FROM months m ORDER BY m.month
SELECT COALESCE(category_name, '(uncategorized)') AS source, SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0 AS value FROM income WHERE date >= date('now', '-365 days') GROUP BY category_name ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT COALESCE(category_group_name, '(none)') AS "Group", -SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0 AS "Spend (EUR)" FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-365 days') GROUP BY category_group_name ORDER BY "Spend (EUR)" DESC

panels.title: Money flow: Income → Group → Category (last 12 months)
panels.description: Where every euro of income lands. Income source on the left, broad category group in the middle, specific category on the right. Width of each band = amount in euros.

targets.rawQueryText: SELECT COALESCE(category_name, 'Income') AS source, 'Total income' AS target, SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0 AS value FROM income WHERE date >= date('now', '-365 days') GROUP BY category_name UNION ALL SELECT 'Total income' AS source, COALESCE(category_group_name, '(none)') AS target, -SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0 AS value FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-365 days') GROUP BY category_group_name UNION ALL SELECT category_group_name AS source, category_name AS target, -SUM(amount_cents) / 100.0 AS value FROM spending WHERE date >= date('now', '-365 days') AND category_group_name IS NOT NULL AND category_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY category_group_name, category_name
